mapper.select: select count(*) from rss_feed_articles r left join friends f on f.id = r.friend_id
select count(*) from rss_feed_articles where is_read = false

select r.id, r.friend_id, coalesce(f.name, '') as friend_name, coalesce(f.url, '') as friend_url, r.title, r.link, r.description, r.published_at, r.is_read, r.created_at from rss_feed_articles r left join friends f on f.id = r.friend_id
order by coalesce(r.published_at, r.created_at) desc, r.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select id, name, rss_url from friends where rss_url is not null and rss_url <> '' and is_pending = false order by id
select id from rss_feed_articles where friend_id = #{friendId} and link = #{link}
mapper.insert: insert into rss_feed_articles (friend_id, title, link, description, published_at, is_read) values (#{friendId}, #{title}, #{link}, #{description}, #{publishedAt}, false)
mapper.update: update rss_feed_articles set is_read = true where id = #{id}
update rss_feed_articles set is_read = true where is_read = false
